title: Tractor Supply Kicks off Annual Grants for Growing Fundraiser in Support of FFA
text: BRENTWOOD, Tenn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #FFA--Tractor Supply Company, the largest rural lifestyle retailer in the United States, is kicking off its seventh annual Grants for Growing fundraiser. This event, which is scheduled during National FFA Week, Feb. 17-28, supports National FFA Organization (FFA) chapters nationwide. title: Tractor Supply Partners with Software AG For Integration Solutions
text: Tractor Supply Co (NASDAQ: TSCO) has partnered with Software AG (OTC: STWRY) to manage customer demand and improve shopping experiences. Tractor Supply uses Software AG's API and integration solution to enable its customers to connect experiences across the store, mobile, and click-and-collect channels.

title: Tractor Supply Partners with Software AG Integration Solutions
text: RESTON, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Tractor Supply (NASDAQ: TSCO), the largest rural lifestyle retailer in the United States, has partnered with Software AG (Frankfurt MDAX: SOW) to manage customer demand and improve shopping experiences, given the company's robust digital growth. Tractor Supply uses Software AG's API and integration solution to enable its customers to connect experiences across the store, mobile and click-and-collect channels. title: Petsense Donates 147,600 Pounds of Dog Food to Support Rescue Organizations Nationwide
text: BRENTWOOD, Tenn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Petsense, a pet specialty retailer, today announced a donation of 147,600 pounds of dog food to the BISSELL Pet Foundation (BPF), the animal welfare-focused charitable nonprofit with a mission to help reduce the number of animals in shelters.
